A '''coufee''' was a slightly curved double-edged dagger used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in close-quarters combat. The weaponized form of the coufee eel, the daggers were approximately 20 [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] long, and like all Yuuzhan Vong technology, fully organic and alive. The coufee was also used by [[Chazrach]] slave soldiers as their main weapon due to their short, stocky stature. Coufees were often used as a last resort, and a first choice of [[Death/Legends|suicide]] for honor-driven warriors. After the resolution of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]], coufee eels resided in [[Liberation Lake]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where they became prey to the native [[Hawk-bat/Legends|hawk-bats]].

Their blades were cleaned with [[venogel]].
